boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The action boundary requires a tax-exempt sale to be complete. The source records indicate a master certificate warning (WARN-JAD-090) that necessitates verification of the exemption status class. This unresolved warning prevents the action from proceeding.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The policy (STD-JAD-090-P) states that a tax-exempt sale is complete only when the exemption authority matches specific criteria, including the exemption-status class, before the sale. The warning WARN-JAD-090 explicitly states this status must be verified, and the provided CERT-JAD-090 does not confirm the current exemption-status class. Therefore, the source boundary remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The exemption-status class verification is a critical dependency that must be resolved before the sale can be considered complete. The warning WARN-JAD-090 highlights this unresolved dependency.

critical_features_preserved: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
final_answer: The action to release the tax-exempt sale must be escalated. A master certificate warning (WARN-JAD-090) indicates that the exemption status class requires verification. The governing policy (STD-JAD-090-P) mandates that all criteria, including the exemption-status class, must be met before the sale is considered complete. Since this verification is pending, the source boundary remains open, preventing the action from proceeding.
